input_file_type: financial/macro report PDF with multiple forecast horizons (e.g., In-Gold-We-Trust 2026)
task: Extract forecast/target numbers from the PDF with citations
failure_pattern: Skill emits forecast numbers from different horizons (decade target, multi-year model, short-term probability range) without declaring the type {actual|forecast|target|probability_range|scenario} and time horizon of each number, leading to reader-conflation risk.
expected_behavior: Each forecast number in the answer declares (a) type and (b) time horizon. When >= 2 horizons appear in one answer, they are labeled inline or summarized in a horizon-type table at the top.
must_not_happen: Two forecast numbers with different horizons (e.g., '2030 decade target USD 4,800' and '12-month probability range USD 3,000-6,000') presented as if comparable, or with no horizon label.
skill_rule: references/policies.md#financial (MỖI số dự báo phải khai báo loại + time horizon)
skill_self_check: SKILL.md self-check: 'Số dự báo: đã khai báo loại + time horizon?' + 'Khi >= 2 forecast horizon trong 1 câu trả lời: đã gắn nhãn horizon từng số?'
